name: Source request
about: Suggest a new source for UMA
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Is your source request related to a specific manga/comic type? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of the source type or what content you want added.

**Describe the source you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Source Information**
- **Source name:** [e.g. "Not Real Scans"]
- **Source link:** [e.g. "https://notrealscans.org"]
- **Language:** [e.g. "English"]

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative sources or features you've considered.

**Acknowledgements**
- [ ] I have checked that the source does not already exist by searching via the search bar and verified it does not appear there.
- [ ] I have searched [existing issues](https://github.com/InvalidDavid/UMA/issues) both open & closed, and confirm that this is a new unreported issue.
- [ ] I have written a meaningful title with the source name.
- [ ] I will correctly fill out all of the requested information in this form.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the source request here.
- 18+/NSFW: [Yes/No]
- Additional details or notes
